task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.ts` as a scoped Zustand task store keyed by effective project scope then `taskId`, with only the M3 single-task and pending-generation selectors plus scoped reset and single/batch upsert actions. Added canonical seeding helpers in the same module for full `Task` snapshots and raw realtime rows through `isTaskDbRow(...)` + `mapTaskDbRowToTask(...)`, kept `useTaskStatusCounts` ownership out of the store, and verified stable selector behavior with `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts` covering single upsert, batch upsert, raw-row hydration, unrelated-selector narrowing, stable pending selector references, and scoped reset. Verification run: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts src/shared/lib/taskRowMapper.test.ts`; `npx tsc --noEmit`.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts src/shared/lib/taskRowMapper.test.ts

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.ts` stores canonical `Task` snapshots under effective project scope keys and `taskId`, exports only single-task and pending-generation selectors plus upsert/reset actions, and preserves stable selector references by reusing unchanged task objects and pending arrays with `shallow` equality for object selectors. The coverage in `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts` proves unrelated task updates do not rerender other task selectors and do not churn pending-generation array references.
